problem: How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer?
hypothesis: Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species may resolve How to achieve biological nitrogen fixation in non-legume crops to eliminate fertilizer? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
